channel.title: Personal on Ezra Natanael
channel.description: Recent content in Personal on Ezra Natanael

item.title: Surviving Bangkit
item.description: If I had to describe my experience during the Bangkit program in one word, it would be Resilience. Bangkit is not for everyone. I know this sounds intimidating, but trust me - the amount of assignments, meetings, Instructor-Led Training (ILT), and other activities can be pretty overwhelming for people who aren’t used to it. It’s very fast-paced, and most of the time you have to learn by yourself, which I suppose is the point of online learning.

item.title: Who Am I
item.description: Who Am I Hey there! I’m Ezra, a software engineer crafting digital solutions in the vibrant tech landscape of Indonesia. While my days are filled with writing code and solving complex problems, there’s more to my story than just bits and bytes. Think of this website as my digital garden - a space where I cultivate ideas, share experiences, and maybe even help fellow developers along the way. Why create this space?
